products.title: Laptop backpack
products.description: Durable 30L travel backpack made from water-resistant 600D polyester. Features a padded compartment for laptops up to 15.6 inches. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 inches. Ideal for daily commuting or weekend travel.

suggested_fix.updated_text: Durable 30L travel backpack made from high-quality, water-resistant 600D polyester, weighing 1.2kg. Features a padded compartment for laptops up to 15.6 inches, compliant with major airline carry-on size restrictions. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 inches (45.7 x 30.5 x 20.3 cm). Available in black, navy, and grey. Ideal for daily commuting or weekend travel.

suggested_fix.updated_text: Experience audio perfection with our hyper-adaptive acoustic mesh, featuring a frequency response of 20Hz-20kHz, impedance of 32 ohms, and a signal-to-noise ratio of 100dB. The integrated quantum noise vector cancels out background noise, while the sub-assembly transducer array and capacitive spectrum filter ensure unparalleled fidelity. Compatible with devices supporting aptX, AAC, and SBC codecs. 1-year limited warranty on electronics, with bulk pricing available for orders over 10 units.
